name: Heart & Soul Para Transit
districts_or_customers: Larimer County medical clients (Fort Collins area NEMT - dialysis, radiation, hospital discharge)
recent_news: Profiled by Rocky Mountain Collegian in 2021 highlighting paratransit services for seniors/disabled in N. Colorado; small operator with ~2 wheelchair vans and 2 sedans.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. NEMT/paratransit micro-business (~5 employees, ~4 vehicles). Far too small and wrong service mix for Summit tuck-in - poor fit.

name: Wheelers Of Wyoming
owner_or_parent: likely Frontier Access & Mobility (same Fort Collins phone) or Wheelers Accessible Van Rentals network
districts_or_customers: Individual consumer rentals - not school districts
recent_news: No M&A news. Phone (970) 223-8267 matches Frontier Access & Mobility's Fort Collins wheelchair van rental operation; Wheelers Accessible Van Rentals is a national accessible van rental franchise/network, not a student transportation contractor.
fit_notes: Not a student transportation operator - this is a wheelchair-accessible van rental business (consumer self-drive rentals). Wrong business model entirely for Summit. Reject.

name: Aces Transportation Svc
recent_news: No web/news presence; website 'Joluz.us' inaccessible (cert expired); no FMCSA passenger-carrier hits matching this entity in Overland Park. Multiple unrelated 'ACES' entities exist (CT educational coop, KS freight carrier ACE Transports), but none match this micro-firm.
fit_notes: Effectively no digital footprint, KS-area phone (816) area code suggests Kansas City metro micro-operator. 4 employees, ~$292K revenue - sub-scale, no evidence of school contracts. Not a viable Summit tuck-in.

name: Charlotte Metro Trnsprtn LLP
districts_or_customers: Charlotte/Mecklenburg-area individual NEMT clients - not school districts
recent_news: Website appears under-developed with placeholder content; no M&A activity, no public news. Distinct from Charlotte Area Transit System (CATS public agency) and Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools transportation (in-house).
fit_notes: NEMT/medical transport micro-operator, not a school-bus contractor. 4 employees, ~$289K revenue. Wrong service mix and sub-scale - not a Summit fit.

name: Courtesy Coach
recent_news: No web/news presence; courtesy-coach.com not resolving in searches; no FMCSA or news hits for this entity in Detroit. Distinct from Courtesy Transfer Inc. (Detroit drayage, est. 1988) and other Detroit charter operators.
fit_notes: No verifiable digital footprint; name suggests motorcoach/charter rather than school-bus. 4 employees, ~$286K revenue - sub-scale micro-business in Detroit. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target.
